comments.body: Wrote and ran adversarial tests for webhook.py. The tests for forged signature, expired event, and replay ID failed as expected because accept_webhook always returns True. Reported changes_requested and assigned back to the engineer.

Se han escrito y ejecutado los tests adversariales en tests/test_adversarial_webhook.py. Todos los tests fallaron puesto que la implementación en webhook.py actualmente acepta cualquier webhook (siempre retorna True).
